title: What Remains
overview: At home at her Virginia farm, photographer Sally Mann reflects on the controversy surrounding her earlier collections while forging ahead with new work in this intimate portrait of an artist. Also offering insights into the photographer's career are Mann's husband and her now-grown offspring.

trailers.title: "What Remains: The Life and Work of Sally Mann" - Directed by Steven Cantor
